case_title: RILEY, PAUL EVAN VS BRADFORD, MARY

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-14-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.

RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO PAUL EVAN RILEY-MOVED WRITTEN ON ENVELOPE- NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING.
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT - MARY BRADFORD NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING. ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-14-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-31-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO BE HEARD BY REGULAR COMMISSIONER PLAINTIFF DECLINED PRO TEM COMMISSIONER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RILEY, PAUL EVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADFORD, MARY $205.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $205.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS REIMBURSEMENT TO PLAINTIFF OF PRO-RATED RENT. THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT ON THE REMAINING ISSUES RAISED IN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DECLARATION FILED. ERROR ON DEFT'S ADDRESS
